caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Elevated Seas Impact St Thomas Today
caribbean.paragraph: St. Thomas is experiencing moderate easterly winds at 16 knots with wave heights reaching 6.4 feet and an 8-second swell period from the ESE. Rain chances are elevated at 58 percent, creating unsettled conditions for marine and port operations in the Eastern Caribbean.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Marseille Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille is experiencing steady winds up to 23 knots with wave heights reaching 3.9 feet and a dominant swell from the west-southwest at a 5-second period. Rain probability is at 100%, indicating persistent precipitation likely to affect port operations and local maritime conditions throughout the day.
